mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inquiry ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT i.*, m.member_id FROM inquiry i JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE i.inquiry_id = #{inquiry_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO response (inquiry_id, ad_id, response_content, created_at) VALUES (#{inquiry_id}, #{ad_id}, #{response_content}, #{created_at})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry i JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx
(i.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
